top.arching_note: plan explicitly states no arching built into braces

back.arch_note: may be arched 43/32 inch or more

string_tension_note: extra-light recommended, tension approx 200lb light gauge over 300lb

sheets.sheet1: Body back and top views, bracing layout, dimensions
sheets.sheet2: Neck, peghead options, bridge, dovetail joint, fret table

notes: Soundboard will sag under string tension — compensate at neck set and saddle
